title: Any interest in Evangelion sheet music
display_title: Any interest in Evangelion sheet music
wikitext:
[]: Any interest in Evangelion sheet music?             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Sep 18, 2013 12:34 am I'm feeling pretty inspired, so I'm thinking that one of these days, I'm going to hop on over the music library of my campus and whip up a couple of pages of sheet music. Can't promise that they will be any good or that they will be done any time soon. I have pretty much every major song to reference (with some exceptions).

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 18, 2013 7:43 am Sagisu actually has quite a bit of 3.0 stuff on his own website in pdfs http://www.ro-jam.com/new.php

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu Sep 19, 2013 5:14 pm Sorry, I only have access to music from the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Mon Sep 30, 2013 3:39 pm When I had the Evangelion Style at hand, it had good transcriptions of some BGMs. I think the book had Rei I, Asuka Strikes! and Borderline Case from the first two CDs, plus some others maybe. I'd quite like a score of the Ritsuko track, if that means anything to you and it really feels interersting for you to do :)

[]:             Quote Post by peripateia » Tue Oct 01, 2013 1:11 am ya I'd love to see some classical NGE sheet music, especially for the piano! Definitely keep us in the loop!

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Tue Oct 01, 2013 4:34 am A Crystalline Night Sky, (CD 2), the one heard when Japan is going lights out for Operation Yashima, that's a nice piano track too and probably quite simple to transcribe.

Article: Any interest in Evangelion sheet music
[]: Any interest in Evangelion sheet music?             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Sep 18, 2013 12:34 am I'm feeling pretty inspired, so I'm thinking that one of these days, I'm going to hop on over the music library of my campus and whip up a couple of pages of sheet music. Can't promise that they will be any good or that they will be done any time soon. I have pretty much every major song to reference (with some exceptions).

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 18, 2013 7:43 am Sagisu actually has quite a bit of 3.0 stuff on his own website in pdfs http://www.ro-jam.com/new.php

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Mon Sep 30, 2013 3:39 pm When I had the Evangelion Style at hand, it had good transcriptions of some BGMs. I think the book had Rei I, Asuka Strikes! and Borderline Case from the first two CDs, plus some others maybe. I'd quite like a score of the Ritsuko track, if that means anything to you and it really feels interersting for you to do :)

[]:             Quote Post by peripateia » Tue Oct 01, 2013 1:11 am ya I'd love to see some classical NGE sheet music, especially for the piano! Definitely keep us in the loop!
